data.body: Gate 1a: intent-aligned — searched 3 git commits on ticket-lib-api.sh, ADR docs, and check-portability.sh. declare -A was introduced in commit 5eeec6a977 with no portability annotation. No ADR or design doc authorizes bash 4+ syntax in scripts. check-portability.sh does not catch declare -A. Sibling functions use python3 for structured parsing. This is a genuine defect.
